activity_id.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID whose stream channels should be listed.

athlete_id.description: Target athlete; defaults to selected athlete in coach mode, or the only athlete otherwise. Format: i12345 or 12345.

include_full.description: When true, include raw upstream stream payloads and samples for available stream channels. Raw samples are otherwise omitted.

keys.description: Optional stream channels to return. Values are canonicalized to snake_case when known; unknown keys are reported in _meta. Keys filter channels only and never opt in to raw samples.

max_points.description: Optional per-channel cap for raw sample arrays. Requires include_full:true; uniformly samples indices while preserving first and last samples, and reports sampling provenance.
